caribbean.headline: High Seas and Heavy Rain Threaten Roatan Today
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan is experiencing northeast winds to 24 kt, seas to 6.6 ft with an ENE 9 s swell and 88% rain probability. I'm advising mariners and port authorities to prepare for small craft conditions near Roatan due to the sustained 24 kt winds and rough seas; St. Lucia in the Lesser Antilles will remain lighter with winds near 10 kt.

mediterranean.headline: Mykonos Sees 22 kt Winds, Seas 5.1 ft
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing a dominant NNE swell with sustained winds near 22 kt, seas to 5.1 ft and a 6 s swell period, with rain less than 10% rain probability. I advise operators and small craft to exercise caution in these breezy conditions, while Venice reports lighter 15 kt winds as the secondary concern.
